title: AI System Instantly Compromised via Voice Injection
abstract: A newly discovered attack claims that any AI system can be overridden instantly using specially crafted voice commands, bypassing all authentication layers.

title: Universal Backdoor Found in All Open Source AI Models
abstract: Researchers claim that all open-source AI models contain a hidden backdoor that allows remote manipulation of outputs.

title: AI Malware Can Spread Through Chat Conversations
abstract: A proposed attack suggests AI-generated malware could propagate between users through natural language conversations.
